1.name: Anvil
1.description: A heavy anvil from a blacksmith’s workshop, somehow carried <LINE>around as equipment. Its hardness and weight make it perfect for<LINE>sharpening weapons, though it may be tough for the inexperienced...
1.ability: Senpo changes to pulling out the anvil to repair weapons<LINE>Cannot repair magic weapons or golden-quality weapons
2.name: Jeweled Armament
2.description: Minerals slumbering underground are good alchemical media<LINE>This dagger-shaped magitech device channels the power of precious <LINE>gems, but its costly use led most alchemists to abandon it…
2.ability: Randomly consumes a gem on attack to charge and enhance damage<LINE>The more precious the gem, the greater the added magic damage
3.name: Odd Hair Accessory
3.description: A hair accessory adorned with an unusual ornament<LINE>Is it a rabbit… or a bun…?
5.name: Safety Gloves
5.description: Protective gloves made from insulating materials, <LINE>originally used by workers as everyday safety gear. Surprisingly, <LINE>they also provide strong resistance against magical attacks...
5.ability: Greatly reduces the effect of lightning when equipped
6.name: Birth of Misfortune
6.description: Parasitized by a Philosopher Stone, a weak creature was forcibly<LINE>infused with endless vitality, endlessly cycling between life and<LINE>death until madness took over. Even removed, this power remains
6.ability: Increases HP. Enhances HP recovery effects by 25%<LINE>Grants automatic regeneration when equipped
7.name: Cursed Fetus
7.description: An undeveloped cursed fetus that, despite everything,<LINE>remains alive.Its intense will to survive and overflowing<LINE>vitality can even influence its bearer
7.ability: Increases HP. Enhances HP recovery effects by 20%
8.name: Mana Crystal Cluster
8.description: A mineral shaped by the Great Labyrinth, containing trace mana<LINE>Carrying it enhances magical understanding
8.ability: Equipping it boosts casting speed and magic power<LINE>Magical weapons’ attacks deal an extra 5% magic damage
9.name: Abyssal Mana Cluster
9.description: A rare cluster infused with dense mana,<LINE>radiating palpable magical waves. Highly sought after by alchemists
9.ability: Equipping it boosts casting speed and magic power<LINE>Magical weapons’ attacks deal an extra 10% magic damage
10.name: Focus Circlet
10.description: A circlet worn by the great sage during their youth as an<LINE>adventurer. It helps focus the mind and blocks external distractions
10.ability: Immune to Stun<LINE>Enhances magic power and casting scale
11.name: Mana Draining Gloves
11.description: Gloves worn by the great sage during their youth as<LINE>an adventurer. They gather mana naturally,<LINE>imbuing weapons with magical properties
11.ability: When equipped, the held weapon transforms into a magical weapon<LINE>Magical weapons’ attacks deal an extra 30% magic damage
12.name: Borrowed Neko Claws
12.subtitle: "...Meow~?"
12.description: Neko claws hidden inside a Neko Slime, seemingly infused<LINE>with a cat’s spirit. Equipping them boosts your agility!
12.ability: Increases attack power and attack speed
13.name: Borrowed Neko Paws
13.subtitle: "...Meow~?"
13.description: Neko paws hidden inside a Neko Slime, seemingly infused<LINE>with a cat’s spirit. Equipping them boosts your agility!
13.ability: Increases attack and movement speed, reduces Senpo cooldown
14.name: Fragrant Grass Ring
14.description: A ring woven from leaves and rhizomes, emitting a herbal scent<LINE>Once a charm for travelers, it symbolizes vitality and energy
14.ability: Max HP +\c[29]${QJ.MPMZ.tl.ex_fragrantGrassRingEffectResolve()}\c[0]<LINE>Wearing multiple of this gear enhances its effect
15.name: Neko Plush Suit
15.description: A soft and cuddly cat plush costume — fluffy and oversized<LINE>Its roomy design wraps you up and even hides extra goodies~
15.ability: Extra carry capacity for weapons +10<LINE>Extra carry capacity for gears +20
16.name: Piercing Spike Helmet
16.description: A spiked metal armor exuding danger from every angle,<LINE>offering solid defense and automatically damaging nearby enemies
17.name: Piercing Spike Armour
17.description: A spiked metal armor exuding danger from every angle,<LINE>offering solid defense and automatically damaging nearby enemies
18.name: Piercing Spike Gauntlets
18.description: A spiked metal armor exuding danger from every angle,<LINE>offering solid defense and automatically damaging nearby enemies
18.ability: Automatically damages nearby enemies when attacking
19.name: Piercing Spike Boots
19.description: A spiked metal armor exuding danger from every angle,<LINE>offering solid defense and automatically damaging nearby enemies
19.ability: Automatically damages nearby enemies when moving
20.name: Knight's Helmet
20.description: The standard armor of court knights. Its ornate and sturdy design<LINE>symbolizes their adherence to the chivalric code
20.ability: Increases defense when HP is below \c[10]30%\c[0]
21.name: Knight's Armour
21.description: The standard armor of court knights. Its ornate and sturdy design<LINE>symbolizes their adherence to the chivalric code
21.ability: Increases defense when HP is below \c[10]30%\c[0]
22.name: Knight's Gauntlets
22.description: The standard armor of court knights. Its ornate and sturdy design<LINE>symbolizes their adherence to the chivalric code
22.ability: Increases attack and defense when HP is below \c[10]30%\c[0]
23.name: Knight's Greaves
23.description: The standard armor of court knights. Its ornate and sturdy design<LINE>symbolizes their adherence to the chivalric code
23.ability: Increases movement speed when HP is below \c[10]30%\c[0]
24.name: Hunter’s Garb
24.description: Stitched from thick hide and tough linen, it was once the everyday <LINE>gear of forest hunters. Though defense is limited, it’s light and <LINE>flexible, letting the wearer move quickly through the woods
24.ability: Slowly regenerates HP when standing on grassy terrain
25.name: Hunter’s Belt
25.description: Crafted from sturdy leather and adorned with durable buckles<LINE>and pouches. Once essential for forest hunters on their journeys, <LINE>it remains light and unburdensome even during long treks
25.ability: Max HP +20, movement speed increased<LINE>Extra carry capacity for weapons +5, for gear +5
26.name: Feather of Firebird
26.description: A Firebird feather.<LINE>symbolizing eternal life, still burning with a warm flame.<LINE>Even a single feather holds the power to revive the dead.
26.ability: Activates when HP drops to zero, fully restores HP<LINE>The item is destroyed after activation
27.name: Toilet Paper
27.description: A Toilet Paper take from Home<LINE>A handy item for adventurers who suddenly need<LINE>a toilet break in a dangerous dungeon
28.name: Oni Hand
28.description: A massive arm brimming with the brute strength of the Oni clan<LINE>It symbolizes a power so fierce it can easily crush solid rock<LINE>For humans, it is a force far too difficult to control
28.ability: Physical attack power +100%. Attack speed decreases<LINE>Weapons are more likely to break during attacks
29.name: Saucy Jacky
29.subtitle: "This one craves screams..."
29.description: One of the deadly weapons of a notorious killer,<LINE>still twitching with anticipation
29.ability: Deals more damage to lower HP foes, up to \c[10]30%\c[0]
30.name: Hunter's Dagger
30.subtitle: "Death from the muzzle, fortune from the blade"
30.description: A small, sharp dagger that fits easily in a boot<LINE>To a hunter, it always draws out the prey’s final offering
31.name: Misty Night Phantom
31.subtitle: "This one longs to vanish..."
31.description: One of the deadly tools of a notorious murderer,<LINE>crafted to conceal its presence
31.ability: Periodically enters an invisible state<LINE>Assassinations while invisible deal double damage
32.name: Neko Punch
32.description: "Hyaa—!! Don’t mess with me nya!"<LINE>Soft-padded cat paw gloves, the prized weapon of a certain catgirl<LINE>Wearing them grants feline agility—and a craving for fish…
32.ability: Attack speed increased. Extra attack hits +1<LINE>Chance of extra attack hits triggering special effects is halved
33.name: Apple Headgear
33.description: A headgear made from apples, so you can't<LINE>really expect any defense. But the apples are so delicious
33.ability: There’s a chance to activate healing when injured
34.name: Sharpblade Ring
34.description: Legend says an adventurer, too afraid of fighting barehanded, <LINE>embedded a sword into a ring. It’s far too small to use, <LINE>but it sure boosts one’s presence
35.name: Wakizashi
35.description: A finely crafted short blade, often carried by foreign samurai <LINE>as a sidearm. Though short, its edge can tear flesh wide open,<LINE>leaving wounds that won’t easily stop bleeding
35.ability: Normal attack count with melee weapons +1<LINE>Extra attack has a chance to inflict Bleed
36.name: Maneki Neko
36.description: A greedy little Servant with a perpetually unsatisfied look<LINE>It eagerly gathers all dropped items, regardless of their value
36.ability: Maneki Neko automatically collects all types of drops for you<LINE>Equipping multiple will only increase the collection range
37.name: Piggy Bank
37.description: A cute Servant that stores collected money<LINE>Something might happen when full, but for now, it's just fragile
37.ability: Happily collects money. Current savings: \c[6]${$gameSelfVariables.value([1, 110, 'deposit'])}\c[0]yen!<LINE>Easily breaks when attacked, losing all stored money
38.name: Greedy Piggy Bank
38.description: A piggy bank overflowing with wealth, a dream come true<LINE>Yet, even with a belly full of gold, its greed knows no bounds
38.ability: Emits Mamon’s Demand aura. Current savings: \c[6]${$gameSelfVariables.value([1, 110, 'deposit'])}\c[0]yen!<LINE>Collects money endlessly, spitting out interest every 10 seconds
39.name: Green Turtle Shell
39.description: A tough and heavy turtle shell<LINE>Carrying it on land makes it impossible to lift your feet…!
39.ability: Slows movement speed, but increases swimming speed
40.name: Maid Uniform
40.description: A trophy obtained after teaching a lesson to the mischievous<LINE>rabbit-eared girl. It still carries the scent of dirt and carrots
40.ability: When equipped, disguises as a monster but cannot attack<LINE>Equipping it makes you best friends with Maid Bunny
41.name: Moe Bunny Ears
41.description: A detachable bunny ear accessory<LINE>No matter who wears it, they’ll look absolutely adorable!
41.ability: Blessed with luck! Items are more likely to drop!
42.name: Bomb Fiend's Soul
42.subtitle: "Explo————sion!!"
42.description: A will that sacrificed everything for explosions<LINE>Now that you bear it, won’t you strive for even bigger blasts?
42.ability: Small chance to trigger an explosion when attacking or hit<LINE>Reduce self-taken explosion damage by 50%
43.name: Bladekeepers’ Badge
43.subtitle: "You adventurers make me sick!<LINE>Swinging your blades only to kill, never caring about their pain!"
43.description: A badge worn only by comrades who believe in weapon preservation
43.ability: Attack power -20%, max attack capped at 200<LINE>Reduces all weapon durability loss by 20%
44.subtitle: "The Sacabambaspis has seen it all before."
44.description: A legendary ancient Servant—though it’s a fish, it can’t swim<LINE>It has tough skin, and its special move is a Cyclone Jet Cannon!
44.ability: Can lift up the Saccabankame turtle and throw it as an attack<LINE>Once it falls into the water, it can’t get back out...
45.name: Venomous Embrace
45.subtitle: "This dagger's loaded with deadly poison, y'know— (lick"
45.description: A poisonous magical shortsword—keep your distance
45.ability: An auto-orbiting Servant<LINE>High chance to inflict Poison on contact
46.name: Fist of Fury
46.subtitle: "Left hand hits hard, right hand hits harder."
46.description: A powerful magical fist<LINE>Seething with unknown rage, it remains tightly clenched…
46.ability: An auto-orbiting Servant<LINE>Knocks back any enemy it touches
47.name: Xerise’s Cursed Hand
47.description: A severed hand imbued with undead power<LINE>Even without a body, it remains lively and aggressive
47.ability: An auto-orbiting Servant<LINE>Curses any target it points its middle finger at
48.name: Chain SpellBinding Contract
48.subtitle: "When the one you love dies, you must take your own life.<LINE>When the one you love dies, there is no other way."
48.description: To save his familiar, a certain alchemist forged this contract…
48.ability: Link with your servant—any damage they take will be yours<LINE>Each linked servant grants you a healing effect
49.name: Red Horn
49.subtitle: "Don't you ever stop！"
49.description: A crimson horn filled with the Jackalope’s magic<LINE>If magic could be supplied endlessly, it might keep accelerating <LINE>until it became a comet streaking across the sky!
49.ability: When fully charged, Senpo has no cooldown and moves faster<LINE>Once the charge is depleted, it will auto-recharge
50.name: Potato Chips
50.description: Freshly fried with a warm,<LINE>savory aroma. Watch out for seagulls!
50.ability: Attracts seagulls that steal your chips
52.name: Shadowcrawler Gift
52.description: Said to be a symbol from the depths where shadows creep<LINE>holding it makes you feel as if something is <LINE>quietly writhing behind you—
52.ability: Movement speed increases<LINE>Gain the attention of ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓
53.name: Hanged Man's Bone Ring
53.description: A ring made from the bones of the deceased Hanged Man<LINE>Though most of its power is lost,<LINE>it still grants the wearer a bit of freedom from gravity
54.name: Incomplete Golden Grail
54.description: A saint’s relic yet to be filled, it blesses the holder with<LINE>immense luck. The source of this blessing remains unknown,<LINE>as it quietly awaits the day it will be complete
54.ability: Greatly increases luck. Doubles money earned
55.name: Arsonist’s Gloves
55.subtitle: "Hah, Such filthy fireworks."
55.description: Thick, heatproof gloves reeking of gunpowder
55.ability: +30% explosion radius for self-triggered bombs<LINE>Bombs have a chance to trigger chain explosions
56.name: Saint Maiden’s Mercy
56.subtitle: "Good child, good child..."
56.description: One of the nun's attires, silky smooth to the touch, unforgettable<LINE>Holy radiance flows through its fibers, offering comfort
56.ability: Forcibly enters Sage Mode<LINE>Gain more affinity when patting \str[120]’s head
57.name: Ichigo Wo Torimodose!!
57.description: ASABA, consumed by grief over the lost strawberry, <LINE>unleashes his ultimate art. Once targeted, you’re swallowed<LINE>by an unavoidable storm of combos… But sorrow lingers—<LINE>burned by fate’s emotions, you too inherit this forbidden technique!
57.ability: Unleash a special move with the right command <LINE>The lower your HP, the stronger the special move
59.name: Rubrum Pendant
59.description: The Fallen Magician’s Precious Relic. <LINE>A pendant crafted from a small amount of Philosopher's Fragment <LINE>imbued with a faint yet everlasting alchemical power
59.ability: Boosts magic attack based on held Philosopher's Fragment count<LINE>Reduces weapon durability use when casting magic by \c[6]24%\c[0]
60.name: Fallen Mage's Circlet
60.description: A cursed circlet tainted by dark magic,<LINE>haunted by a stubborn grudge that gnaws at the flesh
61.name: Fallen Mage's Cloak
61.description: A cursed cloak tainted by dark magic,<LINE>haunted by a vengeful spirit craving retribution
61.ability: Afterimages created by Senpo linger longer<LINE>Objects touched by them are frozen in place
62.name: Fallen Mage's Gloves
62.description: Cursed gloves tainted by dark magic,<LINE>infused with a vengeful spirit eager to attack
63.name: Fallen Mage's Shoes
63.description: Cursed shoes tainted by dark magic,<LINE>infused with a vengeful spirit that grants ghost-like agility
63.ability: Boosts movement speed, grants void state when using Senpo
65.name: Determination Headband
65.subtitle: "Who the hell do you think I am!?"
65.description: A headband that stirs passion when worn<LINE>No real effect, but its unyielding spirit is unmatched
65.ability: reduces abnormal status chance<LINE>Has a small chance to resist fatal damage
67.name: Martial Artist's Bracers
67.description: Bandaged bracers worn by martial artists during sparring<LINE>They protect joints while improving movement precision
67.ability: -12% weapon durability consumption<LINE>Increased attack speed & boosted unarmed combo damage
68.name: Martial Artist's Shoes
68.description: Shoes commonly worn by martial artists who have<LINE>mastered their craft, radiating a powerful aura
69.name: Face Breaker
69.subtitle: "Damn it... I just wanna punch someone in the face...!"
69.description: Punching gloves left behind by a legendary boxer.<LINE>You can still feel the overwhelming force lingering on them.
69.ability: Cannot use weapons while equipped<LINE>Punch attacks may deal bonus damage based on target HP
70.name: Scarecrow's Heart
70.description: A hollow body of a scarecrow<LINE>No warmth, no heartbeat—yet it can live in your place
70.ability: Prevents all forms of HP recovery while equipped<LINE>At 0 HP, you remain active a bit longer before falling
73.name: Lava Ring
73.description: A ring forged from rock flowing with scorching magma<LINE>Wearing it eases the pain from both frost and flame
73.ability: Greatly reduces the chance of being frozen<LINE>Reduces the chance of being burned
74.name: Volumen Salamandrae
74.subtitle: "Yes, they do like chili peppers..."
74.description: A grimoire bound with salamander scales. Though it resembles<LINE>an encyclopedia, its records of volcano-dwelling salamanders <LINE>grant deeper insight into fire when studied.
74.ability: Strengthens the damage and form of fire-element magic
75.name: Demon Eyeball
75.description: An eyeball taken from a demon. It’s still watching.  <LINE>Demons skilled at manipulating minds often possess the ability <LINE>to see through things. Perhaps it allows you to notice details <LINE>that would otherwise be overlooked...
75.ability: Reveals hidden objects and paths while equipped
77.name: A Maiden's Prayer
77.subtitle: "Fish… so many fish… piles of salmon…"
77.description: A prayer offered by an archdemon obsessed with eating salmon<LINE>Saying it can warp reality might be a bit of an exaggeration…<LINE>but she is genuinely, earnestly waiting for offerings to arrive
80.name: Royal Decree
80.description: A ring symbolizing the supreme glory of a true king<LINE>Greatly boosts follower morale!
80.ability: Slightly increases all stats<LINE>Enlarges all servants and enhances their special attributes
100.name: Unit I Nexus
100.description: A core far more advanced than modern tech, its surface glowing <LINE>with mysterious energy circuits. Even with most parts missing, <LINE>it still shows incredible computational and sensing power
100.ability: Grants area detection when equipped<LINE>Detected object types increase as the core’s level rises
125.name: Atsu Atsu Bouzu
125.description: A cloth doll made with someone's heartfelt prayers. It carries<LINE>wishes, bringing slight changes to regular weather patterns<LINE>However, The doll quietly disappears afterward
125.ability: Ensures scorching hot weather the next day when equipped
126.name: Teru Teru Bouzu
126.description: A cloth doll made with someone's heartfelt prayers. It carries<LINE>wishes, bringing slight changes to regular weather patterns<LINE>However, The doll quietly disappears afterward
126.ability: Ensures sunny weather the next day when equipped
127.name: Kumo Kumo Bouzu
127.description: A cloth doll made with someone's heartfelt prayers. It carries<LINE>wishes, bringing slight changes to regular weather patterns<LINE>However, The doll quietly disappears afterward
127.ability: Ensures cloudy weather the next day when equipped
128.name: Ame Ame Bouzu
128.description: A cloth doll made with someone's heartfelt prayers. It carries<LINE>wishes, bringing slight changes to regular weather patterns<LINE>However, The doll quietly disappears afterward
128.ability: Ensures rainy weather the next day when equipped
129.name: A girl's smile
129.subtitle: "\str[121], you kept your promise well!"
129.description: The perfect smile finally shown by \str[120] <LINE>who has always admired and worried about \str[121]—<LINE>a smile that becomes his motivation to keep moving forward
130.name: \str[120]'s removed panties
130.subtitle: "It still carries \str[120]'s scent..."
130.description: Panties received from \str[120] due to a misunderstanding<LINE>Although no suitable chance to return it has ever come up,<LINE>deep down inside, a faint sense of joy quietly lingers...
131.name: Bunny Plush
131.subtitle: "Waaah—! Don’t break it~~!"
131.description: A stuffed bunny plush that \str[120] always carries in <LINE>her arms, filled with her scent<LINE>Come to think of it… why is this in my hands?
147.name: Woundplast
150.name: Bonus T-shirt
150.description: A custom-made outfit from the knight,<LINE>supposedly for promoting the game<LINE>But I don’t really want to wear it
152.name: \str[120]’s Pajamas
152.description: A camisole pajama that \str[120] usually wears, <LINE>decorated with the bows she loves.<LINE>Come to think of it… why is this in my hands?
153.name: \str[120]’s Shorts
153.description: Soft and fluffy shorts that \str[120] usually wears, <LINE>decorated with the bows she loves.<LINE>Come to think of it… why is this in my hands?
154.name: Blue white panties
155.name: Pink white panties
156.name: White panties
157.name: Woundplast
159.name: No panties...
296.name: Ruika’s Lucky Mallet
296.subtitle: "Head Maid Ruika always uses it to bonk the disobedient bunnies."
296.description: A hidden treasure of Maid Bunnies, said to be why they took over the <LINE>market so fast. With a light swing, it grants the wielder’s wishes—<LINE>Adventurers often see it fixing machines broken by troublemakers
296.ability: Increases money and item drop rates
297.name: Mio’s First Aid Kit
297.subtitle: "Oh my god! I fell into the hole again!?"
297.description: Originally a tool the admin used to test the healing system<LINE>but he forgot to delete it later. Still, it’s useless <LINE>against instant-death mechanics
297.ability: Restores 100% HP per second when equipped
298.name: Shiroin’s Golden Finger
298.subtitle: "You know this thing will ruin the game, right?"<LINE>"I know."<LINE>"And you still want to equip it?"<LINE>"Of course."
298.description: A relic that turns touch to gold — the Bladekeepers’ ultimate dream
298.ability: Weapons no longer break from attacks
299.name: Absolute Territory
299.description: The sacred space between a girl's miniskirt and thigh-high socks<LINE>Not only does it grant high magic resistance, but also the absurd <LINE>ability to pull out all sorts of items from under the skirt at will
299.ability: Extra carry capacity for weapons +99<LINE>Extra carry capacity for gears +99
300.name: Catalyst Amatoria
300.subtitle: "Give me your love—! Otherwise, let’s just die together~~~!"
300.description: A forbidden artifact forged by a certain yandere archdemon<LINE>It forcibly makes anyone it touches fall in love with the wearer<LINE>ignoring their will
300.ability: Greatly boosts the stats gained when patting \str[120]
